summary: Iteration 91: Shopify App Store Preparation - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified email updates (all use info@trendscout.click), Privacy Policy with Shopify-specific GDPR sections, Terms of Service with Shopify Integration section, GDPR webhooks respond correctly (401 without HMAC as expected), reviewer account login works, shopify.app.toml has api_version 2026-01, and SHOPIFY_APP_LISTING.md document exists with submission checklist.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health returns status ok
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/info returns support_email=info@trendscout.click
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/info lists GDPR endpoint paths
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/info has correct privacy/terms URLs
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/webhooks/customers/data_request returns 401 without HMAC (expected)
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/webhooks/customers/redact returns 401 without HMAC (expected)
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/webhooks/shop/redact returns 401 without HMAC (expected)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login reviewer@trendscout.click / ShopifyReview2026! succeeds
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com / admin123456 succeeds
FRONTEND: Privacy page (/privacy) loads with data-testid='privacy-page'
FRONTEND: Privacy page contains Shopify store data handling section
FRONTEND: Privacy page contains GDPR Compliance section (section 7)
FRONTEND: Privacy page mentions customer data requests
FRONTEND: Privacy page mentions customer data erasure
FRONTEND: Privacy page mentions shop data erasure
FRONTEND: Privacy page contact email is info@trendscout.click

FRONTEND: Terms page mentions Shopify Admin API
FRONTEND: Terms page mentions draft products
FRONTEND: Terms page contact email is info@trendscout.click
FRONTEND: Shopify App page (/shopify-app) loads with data-testid='shopify-app-title'

FRONTEND: Shopify App page has Privacy Policy link
FRONTEND: Shopify App page has Terms of Service link

FRONTEND: Help page (/help) Contact Support button links to mailto:info@trendscout.click
FRONTEND: LandingLayout footer has info@trendscout.click
FRONTEND: Reviewer account can log in and access dashboard
CONFIG: shopify.app.toml has api_version = '2026-01'
CONFIG: SHOPIFY_APP_LISTING.md exists with Submission Checklist

verified_features.feature: Privacy Policy contains Shopify-specific data handling
Terms of Service contains Shopify Integration section

verified_features.behavior: Returns 401 without HMAC header - expected for Shopify webhook verification

verified_features.verification: Successfully logs in and accesses dashboard

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91: Shopify App Store prep complete. (1) All contact emails across the app use info@trendscout.click. (2) Privacy Policy has Shopify-specific sections including GDPR compliance in section 7. (3) Terms of Service has Shopify Integration section 5. (4) GDPR webhooks at /api/shopify/app/webhooks/* require HMAC verification (return 401 without headers - correct behavior). (5) Reviewer account reviewer@trendscout.click with password ShopifyReview2026! works and can access dashboard. (6) shopify.app.toml has api_version=2026-01. (7) SHOPIFY_APP_LISTING.md has full submission checklist.
